response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web developer (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but lacks nearly every must-have for this role: no native Japanese proficiency, no embedded firmware or LAN-switch experience, no Linux kernel source-modification work, and no demonstrated background in network security (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal). C experience is limited to a brief 2014–2015 stint at National Instruments, far from the required depth in UNIX C development for embedded systems. Profile does not match the required qualifications.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career with senior/staff-level roles
Some exposure to C/C++ at National Instruments and low-latency systems work
Strong testing/TDD discipline and DevOps/CI experience
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, switch chip, or Linux kernel modification experience
No security-domain experience (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, tamper detection)

key_factors.factor: No network security or L2/L3 switch domain experience
